caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a navy blue baseball cap with a logo, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain and a watch on his left wrist. As the scene progresses, he becomes more animated, moving his hands in expressive gestures to emphasize his points. In the background, a white wall features a repetitive logo with stars and the words "HUSTLE" and "EMPIRE". On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a similar logo on the right that says "BOSS TALK 101". A portion of a larger "BOSS TALK 101" sign is also visible behind him. The man remains centered in the frame, shifting his posture and hand positions while continuing to speak into the microphone.
